rewrite.text:
PROVE n_plus_zero: ∀n. n + 0 = n
BEGIN
  ASSUME n : ℕ
  GOAL: n + 0 = n
  INDUCTION n
  PROVE BASE_CASE:
    SIMPLIFY LHS:
      0 + 0
      = 0 [BY plus_0_r]
    THEREFORE 0 + 0 = 0 [BY plus_0_r]
    CONCLUDE: Base case holds [QED]
  PROVE INDUCTIVE_CASE:
    ASSUME m : ℕ
    INDUCTIVE_HYPOTHESIS ih: m + 0 = m
    FACT h1: S m + 0 = S (m + 0) [BY plus_succ_r]
    FACT h2: S (m + 0) = S m [BY ih]
    THEREFORE S m + 0 = S m [BY h1, h2]
    CONCLUDE: Inductive case holds [QED]
  CONCLUDE: By induction, n + 0 = n for all n [QED]
END

skeleton.text:
intros n.
induction n.
- admit.
- admit.
